name: sheety-localization
description: CLI to generate localization from Google Sheets
author: Anton Ustinoff <a.a.ustinoff@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:js && esbuild bin/generate.js --minify --format=esm --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=bin/generate.min.js && rm -rf bin/generate.js
scripts.test: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest
scripts.test:source: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest -- test/generate.source.test.mjs
scripts.test:generated-runtime: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest -- test/generate.generated-runtime.test.mjs
scripts.test:cli-result: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest -- test/generate.cli-result.test.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:js && SHEETY_E2E_IN_PROCESS_COVERAGE=1 npm run test:jest -- --config jest.config.mjs --coverage && npm run coverage:print -- coverage/coverage-summary.json merged && npm run tested:print -- coverage/coverage-summary.json merged
scripts.test:coverage:source: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest -- --config jest.config.source.mjs --coverage && npm run coverage:print -- coverage/source/coverage-summary.json source && npm run tested:print -- coverage/source/coverage-summary.json source
scripts.test:coverage:generated-runtime: npm run build:js && npm run test:jest -- --config jest.config.generated-runtime.mjs --coverage && npm run coverage:print -- coverage/generated-runtime/coverage-summary.json generated-runtime && npm run tested:print -- coverage/generated-runtime/coverage-summary.json generated-runtime
scripts.test:coverage:cli-result: npm run build:js && SHEETY_E2E_IN_PROCESS_COVERAGE=1 npm run test:jest -- --config jest.config.cli-result.mjs --coverage && npm run coverage:print -- coverage/cli-result/coverage-summary.json cli-result && npm run tested:print -- coverage/cli-result/coverage-summary.json cli-result
scripts.coverage: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:source && npm run test:coverage:generated-runtime && npm run test:coverage:cli-result
